question: What was the complete title of the book in which two James Beard Award winners recommended the restaurant where Ali Khan enjoyed a New Mexican staple in his cost-conscious TV show that started in 2015? Write the numbers in plain text if there are some in the title.
answer: Five Hundred Things to Eat Before It's Too Late: And the Very Best Places to Eat Them
raw_answer: Five Hundred Things to Eat Before It's Too Late: And the Very Best Places to Eat Them
scorer_answer: Five Hundred Things to Eat Before It's Too Late: And the Very Best Places to Eat Them
expected_answer: Five Hundred Things To Eat Before It's Too Late: and the Very Best Places to Eat Them

research_queries: Ali Khan New Mexican food restaurant episode
James Beard Award winners restaurant book recommendations
Ali Khan Cheap Eats Food Network New Mexico
James Beard Award winners cookbook restaurant guide New Mexico
working_plan: Identify Ali Khan's cost-conscious TV show that started in 2015
Find specific episodes where he featured New Mexican cuisine
Identify the restaurant where he enjoyed the New Mexican staple
Search for books by James Beard Award winners that recommend this restaurant
Locate the complete title of the book and convert any numbers to plain text
planner.answer_shape: book title with numbers written as words

solver.answer: Five Hundred Things to Eat Before It's Too Late: And the Very Best Places to Eat Them
solver.reasoning_summary: Found that Ali Khan's cost-conscious TV show starting in 2015 was 'Cheap Eats' on Cooking Channel. In the Albuquerque episode, he visited Papa Felipe's Mexican Restaurant where he enjoyed carne adovada (New Mexican staple). Papa Felipe's is recommended in the book '500 Things to Eat Before It's Too Late: And the Very Best Places to Eat Them' by James Beard Award-winning food journalists Jane and Michael Stern. Converted '500' to 'Five Hundred' as requested.
